title: Create More Configs
description: Allows customizing create train track minimum curve limits
body:
Small create addon that allows you to change:
- Train track S Bend, Slope, Straight Ascend and Turns minimum radiuses


## S Bend
![Screenshot showing S Bends at setting 1, 2 and 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fadd732e56a9996bca6ebc6e2a510d93a19977d0.png)
Red: 1 | Green: 2 (create default) | Blue: 4

## Slope
![Screenshot showing Slopes at setting 1, 2 and 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab37f6638f97f1b3c74b233583ac1e6332541af6.png)
Red: 1 | Green: 2 (create default) | Blue: 4

## Straight Ascend
![Screenshot showing Straight Ascents at setting 1, 3 and 6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a830eff98e417395f50b5497896bed10e2b92d6a.png)
Red: 1 | Green: 3 (create default) | Blue: 6

## Turn
![Screenshow showing Turns at setting 3, 7 and 15](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48d7e61f9e080bffa5e4a88c018f053fa5fbde24.png)
Red: 3 | Green: 7 (create default) | Blue: 15

---
i really dont recommend decreasing it
